text:
Shipped a few things this week to keep the garden tidy.

Polly got a V2 upgrade — rewritten internals in Rust, zero sycophancy, and noticeably faster. We also spent some time sweeping the floors: hardened the infrastructure against bots trying to game the tier system, and cleared out duplicate apps from the showcase.

Oh, and nanobanana now properly respects the safe=false flag, because sometimes you just need the raw output. Fresh logos and PWA assets are live too. Code is in the repo.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #rustlang #buildinpublic #retroaesthetic #cozygaming
